summary: Handheld phone footage inside an airport terminal at a row of self-service check-in kiosks numbered 12. An officer in a green uniform and a tactical vest stands working at one kiosk while travelers with luggage, backpacks and a small child wait in line nearby. A wider sampled frame shows a long queue of passengers stretching back through the terminal. The camera pans across the scene.

script.scene: An officer in a tactical vest stands at a self-service kiosk numbered 12 while travelers with luggage and a child wait nearby.
A wide pan shows a long line of passengers with luggage extending through the terminal past the kiosks.
